description_long: This is a large, modern white SUV with a robust and boxy design, featuring four passenger doors and a rear hatch. The vehicle has tinted windows, black roof rails, and a prominent front grille with a gold Chevrolet bowtie emblem. The wheels are silver alloy with a five-spoke design, and the tires are thick, suitable for both urban and off-road driving. The side mirrors are body-colored, and the door handles are integrated smoothly into the body. The rear of the SUV includes a wide tailgate, red taillights, and a subtle rear spoiler. The overall appearance is sleek yet utilitarian, designed for family or group transport in urban and suburban environments.
description: A large, white Chevrolet SUV with tinted windows, black roof rails, and silver five-spoke alloy wheels. It features a boxy, modern design with four doors and a spacious rear hatch.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the SUV, four doors, black roof rails, and silver alloy wheels.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the wide tailgate, red taillights, rear window, and subtle spoiler.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, showing the four doors, wheels, and roof rails.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the bold grille with Chevrolet emblem, large windshield, and front bumper.
